title: Plasmid Isolation: Miniprep Protocol for GeneJET Kit
author: Alba Balletbó
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7j4hkqw

steps.title: Centrifuge overnight culture at 4700rpm for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge overnight culture at 4700rpm for 5 minutes and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 250 µL Resuspension solution and...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL Resuspension solution and resuspend the cells in this. Transfer the mix to an Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 250 µL Lysis solution and...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL Lysis solution and invert the tube 4-6 times.

steps.title: Add 350 µL Neutralization solution and...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL Neutralization solution and invert the tube 4-6 times.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 minutes and transfer...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 minutes and transfer the supernatant to a GeneJET spin column tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 minute. Empty the flowthrough and place the column back in the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Wash buffer and centrifuge for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Wash buffer and centrifuge for 1 minute. Discard the flowthrough and place the column back.

steps.title: Centrifuge for an additional minute to remove all residual ethanol
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for an additional minute to remove all residual ethanol. Place the column in a fresh Eppendorf.

steps.title: Add 25-50 µL of either Elution...
steps.instruction: Add 25-50 µL of either Elution buffer or MilliQ to the column and incubate at room temperature for 1 minute.

steps.title: Discard the column and store the purified DNA in -20ºC
steps.instruction: Discard the column and store the purified DNA in -20ºC.
